summary: Completed testing of the new 5-level Market Regime model. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend tests passed (100%). The Market Regime panel correctly displays one of 5 regimes (COMPLACENCIA/BULL/TRANSICAO/BEAR/CAPITULACAO) with score X/12 format. All 4 component signals (VIX, Yield Curve, Gamma/ZGL, Term Structure) are visible. Treasury endpoint uses yfinance (US10Y/US30Y). Term Structure shows VIX/VIX3M ratio.

minor.issue: MongoDB OverflowError: 'MongoDB can only handle up to 8-byte ints' when saving signals to database. Pre-existing issue, not related to Market Regime feature.

✅ POST /api/analyze returns real_gamma with net_gex and zgl_signal

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix /api/signals/{symbol} MongoDB overflow error (pre-existing, not blocking)
test_credentials: No auth needed - public API endpoints
seed_data_creation: None required - uses live yfinance data for VIX, Treasury, Term Structure
context_for_next_testing_agent: Market Regime feature fully tested. The 5-level regime model (COMPLACENCIA/BULL/TRANSICAO/BEAR/CAPITULACAO) is calculated from 4 signals: VIX (0-3 pts), Yield Curve (0-3 pts), Gamma/ZGL (0-3 pts), Term Structure (0-3 pts). Max score is 12. Thresholds: >=10 COMPLACENCIA, >=7 BULL, >=5 TRANSICAO, >=2 BEAR, <2 CAPITULACAO. Term Structure override: ratio >1.10 forces CAPITULACAO. Treasury uses yfinance (^TNX for US10Y, ^TYX for US30Y). Current observed state: TRANSICAO with score 5/12 (VIX=ELEVATED(1), Yield=NORMAL(2), Gamma=SHORT_Γ(1), TermStructure=FLAT(1)).

feature_verification.treasury_endpoint: Working - GET /api/treasury returns us10y, us30y, spread, curve_state from yfinance
feature_verification.term_structure_endpoint: Working - GET /api/term-structure returns ratio, state, vix, vix3m
feature_verification.analyze_term_structure: Working - POST /api/analyze includes term_structure with ratio
feature_verification.analyze_treasury: Working - POST /api/analyze includes treasury with curve_state
feature_verification.market_regime_panel: Working - Shows 5-level regime with X/12 score
feature_verification.regime_signals: Working - All 4 signals (VIX, Yield Curve, Gamma/ZGL, Term Structure) visible

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all data from live yfinance and DataBento sources
